strengths: Extensive backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq)
Strong engineering leadership and mentorship through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience in roles or projects
No explicit experience with multi-agent AI systems in commercial, regulated, or high-stakes environments
Scant evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or managing external delivery partners
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong backend, distributed-systems, and AI-agent tooling skills, but lacks critical fintech, multi-agent AI production experience in regulated environments and high-stakes commercial contexts. Their leadership and engineering rigor are evident, yet the gaps in domain-specific expertise for this role are significant.
